type.description: Type of log entry to group different entries. According to the type of the log entry, the field reference might have a different meaning

reference.description: Usually an ID according to the type field

ts.description: Unix timestamp marking the time the log entry was written into the database

scope_id.description: Scope for which is log created

action.description: Machine-readable action code for process log entries

display_number.description: Display number of the related process

queue_number.description: Queue number of the related process

appointment_at.description: Appointment datetime in Y-m-d H:i:s format

citizen_name.description: Citizen name at the time of the log entry

scope_name.description: Scope name at the time of the log entry

citizen_email.description: Citizen email at the time of the log entry

citizen_phone.description: Citizen phone at the time of the log entry

process_status.description: Process status at the time of the log entry

db_status.description: Database status at the time of the log entry

citizen_amendment.description: Citizen amendment note at the time of the log entry

display.description: Human-readable display fields derived from indexed columns
